meaning: n.苏伊士(埃及东北部港市,是苏伊士省省会,在苏伊士运河南端)
examples: Cheaper Japanese silk, trade in which was greatly facilitated by the opening of the Suez Canal, was one of the many factors driving the trend.
And Suez may have another suitor.
During the 1956 Suez Canal crisis shipping companies tried to be relieved of their obligations.
He said he had planned to take the boat through the Suez Canal to Alexandria, Egypt.
